sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.44 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Let$W_n = A_5 A_5$be the$n$-times iterated permutational wreath product of$A_5$in its natural action (so$W_n$acts on$5^n$points), and let$W = _{ } W_n$be the inverse limit (infinite iterated wreath product of$A_5$). Does$W$contain a finitely generated dense subgroup of subexponential growth? {{ S.\,Eberhard}}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
